transforms.code:
#	resp = BlueRidge.HMI.CNCLoader.Engine.getEngines()
	oneEngine = value
	extensionTypeUUID = self.session.custom.equipment.extension
	resp = BlueRidge.HMI.CNCLoader.OperationEngine.getOperationEngines()

	oesformyengine = []
	opsformyengine = []
	availableEngineOps = []
	for oe in resp:
		if oe['engineUUID']==oneEngine: #find all operations for my engine
			oesformyengine.append(oe)
			opsformyengine.append(oe['operationUUID'])
	for op in opsformyengine:
		resp = BlueRidge.HMI.CNCLoader.Operation.getOne(op)
		if resp.get('available'):
			availableEngineOps.append(resp)
#	BlueRidge.HMI.CNCLoader.ParameterList.getAll(engineOperationUUID)
	for op in availableEngineOps:
		key = op['key']
		paramLists = BlueRidge.HMI.CNCLoader.ParameterList.getAll(key)
		paramList = next((p for p in paramLists if p.get('extensionTypeUUID') == extensionTypeUUID), None)
		op['verified'] = paramList.get('verified')
#		verifiedAndAvailableEngineOps = [pl for pl in paramLists if pl.get('verified')]
		
	for op in availableEngineOps:
		op['messageID'] = 'Operation'
	return availableEngineOps

resp = BlueRidge.HMI.CNCLoader.EquipmentEngine.getAll(value['key'])
	rerunMode=self.custom.rerunMode
	selectedEngine = self.custom.selectedData.Engine
	for r in resp:
		r['messageID'] = 'Engine'
		r['view'] = r['engineUUID']
		if rerunMode:
			r['value'] = selectedEngine
	if rerunMode:
		resp = [r for r in resp if r.get('engineUUID')==selectedEngine]
	resp.sort(key=lambda x: x['text'])
	return resp

updated_list = [item for item in value if 'mil' in item['name'].lower()]
	return updated_list

if value['cylinder'] and value['cylinder'] !=0:
		selectedValue = 0
		if self.custom.rerunMode:
			selectedValue = self.custom.selectedData.Milling	
		operationFilter = self.custom.millingFilter
		if operationFilter:
	#		system.perspective.print('operationFilter: {}'.format(operationFilter))
			typeFilterKey = operationFilter[0].operationTypeUUID
			buttons = []
#			eos = self.custom.engineOperation
			eos = value['eos']
#			system.perspective.print('eos:{}'.format(eos))
			for v in eos:
#				system.perspective.print('v:{}'.format(v))
				if v.get('type') == typeFilterKey and v.get('available') and v.get('verified'):
#					system.perspective.print('passedv:{} '.format(v))
					buttons.append({
						"view": v.get('key'),
						"messageID": "Milling",
						"text": v.get('name'),
						"value": selectedValue,
						"key": v.get('key')
					})
			buttons.sort(key=lambda x: x['text'])
			buttons.append({
			    "key": 3,
			    "messageID": "Milling-Custom",
			    "text": "Custom Selection",
			    "type": "",
			    "value": selectedValue,
			    "view": 3
			  })
			buttons.append({
			    "key": 2,
			    "messageID": "Milling",
			    "text": "None",
			    "type": "",
			    "value": selectedValue,
			    "view": 2
			  })
			return buttons

updated_list = [item for item in value if 'bor' in item['name'].lower()]
	return updated_list

operationFilter = self.custom.operationFilter
	if len(value)>0:
		if operationFilter: #Should always be. Limit results to BORE operations
	#		system.perspective.print('operationFilter: {}'.format(operationFilter))
			typeFilterKey = operationFilter[0].operationTypeUUID
			buttons = []
			selectedValue = ''
			for v in value:
				if v.get('type') == typeFilterKey and v.get('verified'):
					if self.custom.rerunMode:
						selectedValue = self.custom.selectedData.Operation
					buttons.append({
						"view": v.get('key'),
						"messageID": v.get('messageID'),
						"text": v.get('name'),
						"value": selectedValue,
						"key": v.get('key')
					})
			buttons.sort(key=lambda x: x['text'])
			buttons.append({
						"view": 2,
						"messageID": 'Operation-Custom',
						"text": 'Custom Selection',
						"value": selectedValue,
						"key": 2
					})
			buttons.append({
						"view": 1,
						"messageID": 'Operation',
						"text": 'None',
						"value": selectedValue,
						"key": 1
					})
			return buttons

config.script:
payload = {}
	payload["messageID"] = 'Operation-Custom'
	payload["value"] = -1
	messageType = 'OneShotButton'
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload)
	self.session.custom.selectedBore = 0
#	payload = {}
#	payload["messageID"] = 'Operation'
#	payload["value"] = 0
#	messageType = 'OneShotButton'
#	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload)

#	payload = {}
#	payload["messageID"] = 'Cylinder-Custom'
#	payload["value"] = 0
#	messageType = 'OneShotButton'
#	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload)
	payload = {}
	payload["messageID"] = 'Cylinder'
	payload["value"] = 0
	messageType = 'OneShotButton'
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload)
	self.session.custom.selectedCylinders = []

payload = {}
	payload["messageID"] = 'Milling-Custom'
	payload["value"] = -1
	messageType = 'OneShotButton'
	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload)
	self.session.custom.selectedMill = 0
#	payload = {}
#	payload["messageID"] = 'Milling'
#	payload["value"] = 0
#	messageType = 'OneShotButton'
#	system.perspective.sendMessage(messageType, payload)

selectedData = {
	  "Engine": 0,
	  "Operation": 0,
	  "Cylinder": 0,
	  "Milling": 0,
	}
	if self.view.custom.rerunMode:
		selectedData['Engine'] = self.view.custom.selectedData.Engine
#	self.view.custom.selectedData = selectedData
	self.session.custom.selectedData = selectedData
	self.session.custom.selectedCylinders = []
	self.session.custom.selectedBore = 0
	self.session.custom.selectedMill = 0
#	selectedData = self.session.custom.selectedData
#	selectedCylinders = self.session.custom.selectedCylinders
#	system.perspective.print('selectedData: {}'.format(selectedData))
#	system.perspective.print('selectedCylinders: {}'.format(selectedCylinders))
	trigger = self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
	self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not trigger

params={"key":self.view.custom.selectedData.Engine}
	cylinder = self.view.custom.selectedData.Cylinder
	selectedCylinders = self.session.custom.selectedCylinders
#	system.perspective.print(selectedCylinders)
	if cylinder == 2 and (len(selectedCylinders) == 0): # or self.view.custom.rerunMode):
		selectedData = self.view.custom.selectedData
		self.session.custom.selectedData = selectedData
		system.perspective.openPopup("BlockConfig", "BlueRidge/Components/_HMI/_CNCLoader/Popups/BlockConfig", params)
	else:
		selectedData = self.view.custom.selectedData
		self.session.custom.selectedData = selectedData
		system.perspective.navigate("/hmi/cncloader/recipesubmission")

	return all(value != 0 for value in selectedData.values())

messageHandlers.script:
trigger = self.view.custom.triggerRefresh
	self.view.custom.triggerRefresh = not trigger
	self.view.custom.selectedData = ''

#	system.perspective.print(payload)
	messageID = payload["messageID"]
	value = payload["value"]
	self.view.custom.selectedData[messageID] = value
	
	params={"key":self.view.custom.selectedData.Engine}
	cylinder = self.view.custom.selectedData.Cylinder
	selectedCylinders = self.session.custom.selectedCylinders
#	system.perspective.print(selectedCylinders)
	if value == 2 and messageID == 'Cylinder' and (len(selectedCylinders) == 0): # or self.view.custom.rerunMode):
		selectedData = self.view.custom.selectedData
		self.session.custom.selectedData = selectedData
		system.perspective.openPopup("BlockConfig", "BlueRidge/Components/_HMI/_CNCLoader/Popups/BlockConfig", params)
	if value == 2 and messageID == 'Operation-Custom':
		selectedData = self.view.custom.selectedData
		self.session.custom.selectedData = selectedData
		params={"key":self.view.custom.selectedData.Operation}
		system.perspective.openPopup("CustomBore", "BlueRidge/Components/_HMI/_CNCLoader/Popups/CustomBore", params)
	if value == 3 and messageID == 'Milling-Custom':
		selectedData = self.view.custom.selectedData
		self.session.custom.selectedData = selectedData
		params={"key":self.view.custom.selectedData.Milling}
		system.perspective.openPopup("CustomMill", "BlueRidge/Components/_HMI/_CNCLoader/Popups/CustomMill", params)
